title: True Insights AI copy drafts — tidal-wave pitch
html:
Late-night Slack/Discord exchange with True Insights AI (the Diddles-led sales arm running Rankett's outreach) drafting pitch copy: "AI doesn't guess who to recommend… we make sure your business is sending the right signals," "AI is a tidal wave, not a trend — learn to surf it or get dragged under," and the core promise of chatgpt/perplexity/gemini citations converting "5–25× better than Google ads." Yahir greenlights with "That's fire, just with our company colors."

TL;DR

  • True Insights drafts the Rankett tagline arc: trust signals → "becoming the obvious answer" → "tidal wave, learn to surf it."
  • Milestone Reporting framing: real-time AI visibility tracking, no boring monthly PDFs, plain-English progress updates.
  • Conversion claim: AI-search citations beat Google ads by 5–25× at fraction of cost — the ghost white label sales hook.

rankett · true insights ai · diddles · ai visibility engine · chatgpt · perplexity · gemini
